title: Cappy Ricks
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Albert S. Le Vino, Edward E. Rose
actors: Thomas Meighan, Charles S. Abbe, Agnes Ayres
plot: Seaman Matt Peasley drifts into San Francisco with his pal Murphy and rescues Florrie Ricks, daughter of shipowner Cappy Ricks, from a pickpocket. Peasley and his friend are signed on one of Cappy's ships. When the ship's captain ...
